# Security Company Melbourne (SCM)

> Licensed, insured and police-checked security guards and crowd controllers across Greater Melbourne, Victoria. Available 24/7 for sites and events of any size. Services include static guards, mobile patrols, event security, crowd control and commercial security.

SCM is a Melbourne-based private security provider. Every officer holds a current Victorian security licence, the business holds a Private Security Business Licence, and all guards are police-checked and insured. We cover the Melbourne CBD, all metro suburbs, plus Geelong and Dandenong.

## Services
- [Security Guards Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/security-guards-melbourne/): Licensed static, mobile, event, corporate, retail and construction guards, available 24/7.
- [Event Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/event-security-melbourne/): Licensed crowd controllers and guards for festivals, parties, weddings, corporate functions and sporting events. Includes a guards-per-100-guests ratio guide.
- [Commercial Security Melbourne](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/commercial-security-melbourne/): Manned guarding, access control, mobile patrols, alarm response and CCTV for businesses.
- [All Security Services](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/security-services-melbourne/): Full range of guarding and electronic security services.

## Company
- [Service Areas](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/service-areas/): Melbourne CBD, metro suburbs, Geelong and Dandenong.
- [Licensing & Compliance](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/licensing-compliance/): Victorian security licensing, insurance and accreditation.
- [Our Process](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/our-process/): How we assess, quote, deploy and report.
- [Contact](https://securitycompanyinmelbourne.com/contact/): Get a free security quote.
